Off Calendar Apr-15-2014 Granted Per Written Order

Petiton Of Order Confirming Successor Trustee And Trust Assets
Off Calendar Apr-08-2014 Continued To Apr-15-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petiton Of Order Confirming Successor Trustee And Trust Assets
Off Calendar Mar-25-2014 Continued To Apr-08-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amanda Ebey for John Kiefer.

Ms. Ebey stated that she just substituted in last week and that she is hoping they have all of the documents. The Court noted that Mr. Murphy's petition is missing pages and asked Counsel to refile the petition. Ms. Ebey also stated that no will is in the file, that there are Nephews, Nieces, charities and a Daughter who are all beneficiaries, that the notice and petition does list all Beneficiaries, that there is urgency with regard to the condominium incurring home owners association fees and that the association wants to foreclose. The Petition for Order Confirming Successor Trustee and Trust Assets was continued to April 8, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
